blended.narrative: Gore Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 56°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
